source: Hand-maintained companion to criteria.json. The signed-off workbook has NO applicability column, so this file is the single source for which product feature puts each CONDITIONAL-* check in scope. extract_workbook.py merges `applies_when` onto each check; the scorer treats a conditional check as N/A (not a fail, not a pass) when the card's `features` set lacks the tag.

features.voice: ships a voice agent (@caistech/elevenlabs-convai) — incl. its memory, webhook-HMAC, allowlist and server-derived-identity security checks
features.auth: has an authenticated user flow (login / signup / reset / magic-link)
features.supabase: uses Supabase (idempotent migrations via CLI / RLS every table / no client-side service key)
features.third-party-content: users create or share content built on third-party IP
features.address-or-abn-fields: has address or company/ABN input fields
features.public-web: has a public-facing web surface (landing/marketing/app site) that AI search + browser agents can reach — N/A for pure internal tools, headless/MCP-only infra, or CLI products
